title: Pharmacy First: urinary tract infection (UTI)
content: Under Pharmacy First a pharmacist can assess and treat uncomplicated lower UTI in women aged 16 to 64. It does NOT cover men, pregnant women, children under 16, recurrent UTI, or suspected upper UTI (fever, flank or loin pain, vomiting) which need GP or urgent assessment. Eligible patients can be supplied antibiotics directly without a GP appointment.
